name: Coonskin Park
description: Come play pickleball at Coonskin Park in Charleston, WV! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Jackson Park
description: Jackson Park is a place to play pickleball in South Charleston, WV. There are 4 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Joplin Park
description: Come play pickleball at Joplin Park in South Charleston, WV! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Kanawha City Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Kanawha City Community Center in Charleston, WV! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Nitro Athletic Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Nitro Athletic Complex in Nitro, WV! There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, and youth programming.

name: North Charleston Community Center
description: North Charleston Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Charleston, WV. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Roosevelt Neighborhood Center
description: Roosevelt Neighborhood Center is a place to play pickleball in Charleston, WV. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Shawnee Park
description: Shawnee Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dunbar, WV. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: South Charleston Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at South Charleston Community Center in South Charleston, WV! There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: YMCA of Kanawha Valley
description: Come play pickleball at YMCA of Kanawha Valley in Charleston, WV! There are 13 indoor wood and concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Amenities include restrooms and locker rooms.
